name: lead-assignment
description: A simple CRM-style lead management system with authentication, role-based access, pagination, filtering, and CRUD operations for leads.

scripts.clean: rd /s /q frontend\node_modules && rd /s /q backend\node_modules && del frontend\package-lock.json && del backend\package-lock.json
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run start --prefix backend
